allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Expansion Plan Milestone 3 - Server Copy + ArcPy Scripts \(v1.2.2\)

Milestone 3 Complete:
- Updated copy_consolidated_dataset_to_server.ps1 to read from manifest.json \(v2.0.0\)
  - Added -DryRun switch for testing without file copy
  - Added file integrity verification \(size comparison\)
  - Displays manifest metadata during execution
- Created docs/arcgis/import_cad_polished_to_geodatabase.py
  - arcpy ExcelToTable script for geodatabase import
  - Pre-flight checks, backup, and verification
- Created docs/arcgis/README.md
  - Workflow guide with order of operations
  - Troubleshooting and configuration reference

Also included:
- Milestone 2 reports migration to consolidation/reports/2026_01_31_legacy/
- REMOTE_SERVER_GUIDE.md for comprehensive server documentation
- Updated CHANGELOG, README, SUMMARY, Claude.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Expansion Plan Milestone 4 - Speed optimizations \(v1.2.3\)

Performance Enhancements:
- Parallel Excel loading with ThreadPoolExecutor \(8 workers\)
- Chunked reading for large files \(>50MB\) via openpyxl read_only
- Memory optimization: 66-68% reduction via categorical/downcast
- Baseline + incremental mode: load baseline once, append new data

Timing Results:
- Full mode \(parallel\): 8 files in 128.9s, 724,794 records
- Incremental mode: ~170s total \(baseline load + memory opt\)
- Memory: 770 MB -> 260 MB after optimization

CLI Enhancements:
- --full: Force full consolidation
- --dry-run: Preview mode selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Expansion Plan Milestone 5 - Monthly processing \(v1.2.4\)

Monthly Validation Scripts:
- Added validate_cad.py: Full CAD export validation CLI
- Added validate_rms.py: Full RMS export validation CLI

Features:
- Quality scoring \(0-100\) with category breakdown
- Action items export \(Excel with P1/P2/P3 priority sheets\)
- HTML validation summary with visual quality indicators
- JSON metrics for trend analysis
- Auto-generated report directories \(YYYY_MM_DD_cad/, YYYY_MM_DD_rms/\)

CAD Validation Checks:
- Case number format \(YY-NNNNNN pattern\)
- Required fields: ReportNumberNew, Incident, TimeOfCall, etc.
- Domain value validation \(HowReported\)
- Call type format validation using call_type_normalizer

RMS Validation Checks:
- Case number format
- Required fields: CaseNumber, IncidentDate, IncidentTime, etc.
- Date validation \(future dates, old dates\)
- Time validation \(known "1" artifact detection\)
- Offense code validation

Configuration:
- Added monthly_processing section to consolidation_sources.yaml
- Config version updated to 2.1.0

Package Structure:
- Created __init__.py files for shared/ and monthly_validation/
- Proper Python package imports enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
